title: Square brackets and curly braces
description: [ ] for arrays/refs, { } for objects/groups — both above main brackets
finger_focus: Right pinky reaches up to [ ] (above ; ') and { } (Shift + [ ])

tips.text: [ and ] — right pinky, top row, no Shift
Used in code: arrays list[i], objects {key: value}

character_tips.anna: Square brackets for lists, curly for objects. Right pinky for both.
character_tips.maxim: Coding-essential symbols. JavaScript, Python, JSON — all use these.
character_tips.knopych: DATA BRACKETS! Arrays and objects! [code mode] {ON}! 🤖
character_tips.klavochka: Different brackets for different jobs — fancy! ✨
